title: AI model-launch event study
question: Does a frontier-model launch reliably move software (SaaS) stocks?
finding: No — across 11 launches software barely moves vs QQQ (+0.33% over [0,+5]); the famous GPT-4 "crash" was the SVB banking week, not the model; ex-confound the other 10 averaged ~+1%. Only AI-*exposed* lagging AI-*insulated* by ~1 pt/month is real — too small to trade.
